equipment.name: Champion of Ynneadʸ
equipment.desc: Everytime a model dies within 6" of this model it gains one temporary wound. The wound is lost at the end of the battle round. Can only have one temporary wound at a time.

equipment.name: Hungering bladeʸ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains cumulative Flurry(4). Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: Mirrorgazeʸ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities. Unique.

equipment.name: Silent bladeʸ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains Shield breaker(-2). Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: Sorrow bladeʸ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains +1 Strength and Decimate. Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: The Lost Shroudʸ
equipment.desc: To wound rolls against the bearer suffer a -1 penalty. (Unique)

equipment.name: Wardenʸ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Bodyguard" and "Command squad" abilities.
